texto: Saphira: The worth is in the act. Your worth halts when you surrender the will to change and experience life. But options are before you
autor: choose one and dedicate yourself to it. The deeds will give you new hope and purpose.Eragon: But what can I do?Saphira: The only true guide is your heart. Nothing less than its supreme desire can help you.
